name: revit_add_family_parameters
description: Adds family and shared parameters from definitions to the active family document.

parameter_definitions_path.description: Path to familyParameter.txt and sharedParameter.txt folder, or inline definitions file

family_document_only.description: When true, requires the active document to be a family (default behavior)

notes: Refactor FamilyParameterAssigner to accept structured definitions instead of fixed assembly-folder txt files.
